cleavage agent: digested with enzymes: LysC (LysC-to-protein ratio of 1:100) and trypsin (trypsin-to-protein ratio of 1:100)
fractionation method: fractionated (12 fractions) using the basic pH RPLC method
instrument: Samples were analyzed on the Orbitrap Fusion Lumos (Thermo Scientific)
labeling: the samples were then labeled with 10-plex Tandem Mass Tagging TMT.
reduction reagent: Purification Buffer (150 mM NaCl, 50 mM HEPES, and 1 mM TCEP, pH 7.4)
reduction concentration: Purification Buffer (150 mM NaCl, 50 mM HEPES, and 1 mM TCEP, pH 7.4)
